title: Dynamic link between tables

posts.author: Maxence (Bob Dylan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
When I create a new folder with the name of a project for example “project 1”, I would like the name of this project to be added in a new line of my table which lists my different projects. Is it possible ?

image1624×586 73.3 KB

Here for example, I would like that when I create the “ACV Scorecard” folder, an ACV Scorecard line is created in the “Portefeuille projets capacitaire” table
Thanks !

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Maxence,

I am afraid this type of functionality is not currently natively supported - regarding item creation based on folder creation. That said, I’d encourage you to check out our API information incase this request is possible through our API - Items Feel free to reach out to our developers community too with your request, monday Apps & Developers - monday Community Forum
